CREATE TABLE flights (flight_id INT PRIMARY KEY, arrival_date DATE, arrival_time TIME, arrival_timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO flights (flight_id, arrival_date, arrival_time, arrival_timestamp) VALUES (1, '2023-10-01', '14:30:00', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 14:30:00');
INSERT INTO flights (flight_id, arrival_date, arrival_time, arrival_timestamp) VALUES (2, '2023-10-01', '16:45:00', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 16:45:00');
INSERT INTO flights (flight_id, arrival_date, arrival_time, arrival_timestamp) VALUES (3, '2023-10-02', '08:15:00', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 08:15:00');
SELECT flight_id, arrival_timestamp FROM flights WHERE arrival_timestamp BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 00:00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 23:59:59';
SELECT flight_id, arrival_timestamp FROM flights WHERE arrival_timestamp IS NOT NULL;
SELECT flight_id, arrival_timestamp, arrival_date, arrival_time FROM flights ORDER BY arrival_timestamp DESC;
SELECT f1.flight_id, f1.arrival_timestamp FROM flights f1 JOIN flights f2 ON f1.flight_id != f2.flight_id WHERE f1.arrival_timestamp < f2.arrival_timestamp;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights WHERE arrival_timestamp > (SELECT AVG(arrival_timestamp) FROM flights);
CREATE TABLE delayed_flights AS SELECT flight_id, arrival_timestamp FROM flights WHERE arrival_timestamp > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 15:00:00';
SELECT flight_id, arrival_timestamp FROM delayed_flights WHERE arrival_timestamp BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 15:00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 15:00:00';
SELECT DISTINCT arrival_date, MAX(arrival_time) FROM flights GROUP BY arrival_date;
INSERT INTO flights (flight_id, arrival_date, arrival_time, arrival_timestamp) VALUES (4, '2023-10-01', '20:00:00', TIMESTAMP (arrival_date || ' ' || arrival_time));
SELECT flight_id, arrival_timestamp FROM flights WHERE arrival_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(arrival_timestamp) FROM flights);
UPDATE flights SET arrival_timestamp = arrival_timestamp + INTERVAL '1 hour' WHERE flight_id = 1;
DELETE FROM flights WHERE arrival_timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-30 00:00:00';
